calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson II; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Janet Gray.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Magdalena Lopez is present.
Attorney John Weinstein representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JUN-11-2012 is vacated.
